description: Epistasis-controlled rebuild of the CONTROLLED survival-binary task (LB-0138) with MULTI-GENE and transgene genotypes REMOVED — single-gene genotypes only. Same controlled curation and 120-genotype structure as the mixed multi-gene set, both ablation conditions. Live eval run 2026-05-24. Record schema and compute recipe are identical to ../manifest.json.
task: LB-0138 survival binary, controlled, single-gene only

headline.finding: Controlling for epistasis (single-gene only) shrinks Delta_recall toward zero and removes its significance (Longevity 0.100→0.017, p 0.017→0.86; Claude 0.083→0.050). Absolute accuracy also drops (single-gene genotypes are harder). Consistent with single-gene obscure genotypes being genuinely retrieval-resistant — the gene name carries little recallable signal — with the multi-gene cases having carried most of the recall effect. CAVEAT: n=120, underpowered; the single-gene CIs overlap the multi-gene baseline, so the shift is SUGGESTIVE, not significant at this n.
